termsAndConditions.text:
Last modified: December 16, 2013

Welcome to www.lorem-ipsum.info. This website is provided as a service to our visitors and may be used for informational purposes only. Since the Terms and Conditions contain legal obligations, please read them carefully.

1. Your Agreement

By using this website, you agree to be bound by and comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these Terms and Conditions, please do not use this website.

Note: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to change, modify, or alter these Terms and Conditions at any time. Unless otherwise stated, amendments become effective immediately. Please review these Terms and Conditions periodically. Your continued use of the website after changes and/or modifications are posted will constitute your acceptance of the revised Terms and Conditions and the reasonableness of these standards for providing notice of changes. For your information, this page was last updated as of the date indicated above these Terms and Conditions.

2. Privacy
Please review our Privacy Policy, which governs your visit to this website, to understand our practices.

3. Linked Sites
This website may contain links to other independent third-party websites ("Linked Sites"). These Linked Sites are provided solely for the convenience of our visitors. These Linked Sites are not under our control, and we are not responsible for their content nor do we endorse them, including any information or materials contained therein. You will need to make your own independent judgment regarding your interaction with these Linked Sites.

4. Forward-Looking Statements
All materials reproduced on this website are current as of the date of original publication or submission. The availability of a document on this website does not mean the information contained therein has not been modified or superseded by events or by a subsequent document or submission. We have no obligation or policy to update any information or data contained in this website, and therefore, these information or data should not be relied upon as being current as of the date you access this website.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties and Limitation of Liability
a. This website may contain inaccuracies and typographical errors. We do not warrant the accuracy or completeness of the materials, or the reliability of any advice, opinion, statement, or other information displayed or distributed through the website. You expressly understand and agree that: (a) your use of the website, including any reliance on any opinion, advice, statement, memorandum, or information contained herein, shall be at your sole risk; (b) the website is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis; (c) except as expressly provided herein, we disclaim all warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, effort, ownership, and non-infringement; (iv) we make no warranty regarding the results that may be obtained from this website, or the products or services advertised or offered or the merchants involved; (v) any material downloaded or otherwise obtained through the use of the website is done at your own discretion and risk; and (vi) you will be solely responsible for any damage to your computer system or loss of data that results from downloading any such material.
b. You expressly understand and agree that in no event, including but not limited to negligence, shall we be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use any of our sites or materials or functions on any such sites, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages. The foregoing limitations apply notwithstanding any failure of essential purpose of any limited remedy.

6. Exceptions and Limitations
Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of certain warranties or the limitation or exclusion of liability for incidental or consequential damages. Accordingly, our liability in such jurisdiction shall be limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.

7. Our Proprietary Rights
This website and all its contents are intended solely for personal, non-commercial use. Except as expressly provided, nothing within the website shall be construed as granting any license under our or any third party's intellectual property rights, whether by estoppel, implication, waiver, or otherwise. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, you acknowledge and agree that all content available through the website and its services and used to operate it is protected by copyright, trademark, patent, or other proprietary rights. You agree not to: (a) modify, alter, or deface any of the trademarks, service marks, trade dress (collectively referred to as "Trademarks") or other intellectual property we provide in connection with the website; (b) retain your ownership
